free_text: Polarization of neutrons in scattering from light
nuclei and in the Li7(p,n)Be7 reaction
Li-7(p,n) polarization data from same work
Tank containing 10 BF3 counters immersed in a
differential cross section of polarized neutrons.
Asymmetries of the scattered neutrons were measured
with two detectors set at the same scattering angle
Calculated from measured Left/Right asymmetries ratios,
using 7Li(p,n) polarization values measured in this
work and, at higher energies, from previously published
. finite sizes of scatterer and detector
BP: corrections according last EXFOR rules
and Dict., Updated information and status, digitized
Corrected for 6Li content, and inelastic scattering
Background subtracted using runs on metallic Sn
Errors shown on all curves are statistical
Cross sections were multiplied by a factor of 4 pi.
